title: Alex and Steve Villagers
description: Bring default player skins to villagers.
body:
This pack uses some [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) exclusive features and therefore <font color="#f02222">**is not compatible with optifine!**</font>

This pack will give villagers player skins from the game. All 9 defaults plus a few from the skins pack available for Minecraft Java. Also Derp!
![Show a sample of the textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e09c2dee400a3c65431449a642d21a88d62790.png)


# <font color="#daa520">Addons:</font>

Keep track of what versions of my packs are compatible with wich addon version with this file: [[<font color="#daa520">with this link</font>](https://1drv.ms/x/c/5017ea34619ff0f9/EYARtfWSbd1IsoYWCn7M-CkBHKTpT6MVfBMwl93LenDkAg?e=dbVTA0)]


- [[<font color="#008000">Animations</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-animations-lib) With Semos Animations Lib the model will have Fresh Animations inspired animations.
- [[<font color="#008000">Capes</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-cape-addon) Capes will have about 50% chances to render. The texture distribution follow the actual number of owner per cape
- [[<font color="#008000">Cosmetics</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-cosmetic-addon-lib) Let you use several cosmetics packs <font color="#eb7200">Warning! </font><font color="#f02222">Can be heavy on performances</font>
- [[<font color="#008000">Multi Semos Villagers pack</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-villagers-compat-pack) You like this one but also another of my villagers pack? You can mix them with the help of this addon. My other packs:  [[<font color="#05ACE3">Hermitcraft Villagers</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hermitcraft-villagers) and [[<font color="#05ACE3">Songs Of War Villagers</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/songs-of-war-villagers)
- [[<font color="#008000">Biome fix</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-villagers-biome-fix) 
<font color="#f02222">For 1.21.9+</font> Display the biome outfits of villagers. <font color="#eb7200">Warning! </font><font color="#f02222">Very heavy on performances</font>
- [[<font color="#008000">Job fix</font>]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/semos-villagers-job-fix) 
<font color="#f02222">For 1.21.9+</font> Display the job outfits of villagers. <font color="#eb7200">Warning! </font><font color="#f02222">Very heavy on performances</font>
- Upcomming:
- ~~Modded support~~ (comming soon)

# <font color="#daa520">Compatibility:</font>

Since this pack still display few of the vanilla villagers, it should be compatible with other pack that change the villager model as long as they are using the vanilla one. (suffix one)

<font color="#142FB5">Before 1.21.9</font>, villager professions and biome will render on my models but won't be affected by packs changing them. Those that add variations to those will not work properly on the vanilla models villagers. My pack will randomize 10 of their textures. To retain their full fonctionality you will need to edit their ```.properties``` texture files. you should copy the following at the top of those properties files: 
```
modelSuffix.2=100-500
skins.2=1000
```
(And increments the suffixes accordinly) Those packs will also need to be on top of mine in the ressource pack list!

<font color="#142FB5">Since and after 1.21.9</font>, my villagers won't show any professions or biome unless you use the add-ons that fix this. If you do so, any pack changing those textures will apply normaly to my villagers. I hope someday I can support that fully without a massive loss in fps, but so far I can't do much.

# <font color="#daa520">Advanced Control:</font>
You can control the texture by using a name tag. You can also toggle a nose and the second layer visibility.
The list of Custom names for each hermit is below. Use ```nose``` and ```2nd layer``` to toggle the later. Additionaly, you can control the cape displayed if you use the cape addon pack, the list is on the ressource pack page.

The order in the custom name has no importance. 
![Example of renaming to toggle features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11794323902d5b9ff428be71681e19fd2f125f8b.png)

# <font color="#f02222">Issues:</font>
<details>
<summary>🛠️ Known issues:</summary>

- Jobs and Biomes outfit currently not supported by my custom model. I hope this will be in the future
- Fresh Animation villagers will not close their eyes when sleeping

</details>
